title: Jasper AI Cheat Sheet
description: Quick reference for using Jasper AI effectively in everyday tasks.

commands.command: Write a blog post about [topic]
commands.description: Generates a full blog post on a specified topic.
commands.scenario: When you need to create content for your blog quickly.

commands.command: Summarise this article
commands.description: Provides a concise summary of any given article.
commands.scenario: When you need to understand the main points of a long article quickly.

commands.command: Rewrite this in simpler language
commands.description: Rephrases text to make it easier to understand.
commands.scenario: When an email or document is too complex.

commands.command: Generate ideas for [topic]
commands.description: Creates a list of ideas related to a specified topic.
commands.scenario: When brainstorming for new project or content ideas.

commands.command: Create a social media post about [topic]
commands.description: Drafts a social media post for a specified topic.
commands.scenario: When you need engaging content for social media platforms.

commands.command: Explain [concept] to a 5-year-old
commands.description: Simplifies complex concepts for easy understanding.
commands.scenario: When you need to break down complex ideas.

commands.command: Translate this text to [language]
commands.description: Translates text into another language.
commands.scenario: When you need to communicate with someone in a different language.

commands.command: List pros and cons of [topic]
commands.description: Generates a list of advantages and disadvantages for a topic.
commands.scenario: When evaluating options or making decisions.

commands.command: Create a catchy headline for [topic]
commands.description: Generates an attention-grabbing headline.
commands.scenario: When you need a compelling title for an article or post.

commands.command: Draft an email about [subject]
commands.description: Creates a draft email based on the given subject.
commands.scenario: When you need to send a professional email quickly.

commands.command: Summarise this in 3 bullet points
commands.description: Condenses information into three main points.
commands.scenario: When you need a quick overview of detailed information.

commands.command: Create a to-do list for [task]
commands.description: Generates a list of steps or tasks to complete a project.
commands.scenario: When organizing tasks for a project or day.

commands.command: Provide a detailed explanation of [topic]
commands.description: Gives an in-depth explanation of a specified topic.
commands.scenario: When you need to understand a topic thoroughly.

commands.command: Generate a list of questions about [topic]
commands.description: Creates questions to explore a topic further.
commands.scenario: When preparing for interviews or research.

commands.command: Write a product description for [item]
commands.description: Creates an engaging product description.
commands.scenario: When listing items for sale online.

commands.command: Convert this list into a paragraph
commands.description: Reformats a list into a cohesive paragraph.
commands.scenario: When you need to present list information in narrative form.

commands.command: Change the tone of this text to [tone, e.g., witty, professional, urgent]
commands.description: Adjusts the emotional resonance and stylistic delivery of existing content without changing the core meaning.

commands.command: Act as a [persona, e.g., marketing expert, travel agent] and critique my [content]
commands.description: Uses role-prompting to get specialized feedback or a professional perspective on your drafts.

commands.command: Expand this sentence into a full paragraph about [context]
commands.description: Takes a brief thought or bullet point and builds it out into descriptive, flowing prose.

commands.command: Create a table comparing [item A] and [item B] based on [criteria]
commands.description: Forces Jasper to organize information into a structured, easy-to-read grid format.

commands.command: Extract the key entities (names, dates, locations) from this text
commands.description: Scans long documents to pull out specific data points for quick reference.

commands.command: Analyze the sentiment of this text and suggest improvements to make it more [positive/persuasive/empathetic]
commands.description: Evaluates the emotional undertone of your writing and provides actionable feedback to align with your desired audience reaction.

commands.command: Create a 7-day content calendar for [platform] focusing on [niche/topic]
commands.description: Generates a structured weekly schedule of post ideas to prevent creator burnout and maintain consistency.

commands.command: Turn this transcript/notes into a structured FAQ section
commands.description: Converts messy meeting notes or raw video transcripts into a clean, customer-facing Frequently Asked Questions format.

commands.command: Write a 'Hook, Value, Call-to-Action' framework for this [topic]
commands.description: Uses proven marketing structures to ensure social media posts or ads grab attention and drive specific user actions.

commands.command: Identify potential counter-arguments to this argument and provide rebuttals
commands.description: Helps strengthen persuasive writing or debate prep by anticipating and addressing opposing viewpoints.
